subtitle: Enter pre-existing inventory at system start (opening / carry-over entry)
info: Opening stock is used to record inventory that already existed before you started using the system, with its cost. No cash/bank movement, no supplier balance impact. Reported separately from real purchases.

form.title: New Opening Entry
form.warning: This is not a real purchase. It enters inventory and cost only; no cash, bank or supplier account movement is created. Typically used once, when switching to the system.
form.emptyItems: No items added yet. Click "Add Item".
form.noProductsWarning: No products yet. Please add products from the 'Products' page first, then enter their opening stock here.

validation.selectProduct: Select a product for all items

toast.noProducts: Product list is empty — please add products first

confirm.cancel: Cancel opening entry {{number}}? Stock will be reverted (if sufficient stock exists).
